    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./nginx/certs:/etc/nginx/certs:ro
      - logs_shared:/var/log/nginx
    tmpfs:
      - /var/cache/nginx:size=128M
      - /var/run:size=64M
      - /tmp:size=64M
    read_only: true
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "nginx -t && wget -qO- http://localhost:443/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - NET_BIND_SERVICE  # Solo para puertos < 1024
    environment:
      - NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES=auto

    logging:
      driver: json-file

    volumes:

      - ./postfix/master.cf:/etc/postfix/master.cf:ro
      - postfix_mail:/var/mail:rw
      - postfix_queue:/var/spool/postfix:rw
      - logs_shared:/var/log/postfix

    tmpfs:

    cap_drop:

  # =================================================================

      monitor-network:
        ipv4_address: 172.23.0.20
    expose:

    volumes:

    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
      - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
      - '--storage.tsdb.retention.time=15d'
      - '--storage.tsdb.retention.size=10GB'
      - '--web.enable-lifecycle'
      - '--web.enable-admin-api=false'
      - '--web.console.templates=/etc/prometheus/consoles'
      - '--web.console.libraries=/etc/prometheus/console_libraries'
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=32M
    read_only: true
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:9090/-/healthy | grep -q \\"Prometheus Server is Healthy\\""]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 15s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2G

      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "{{.Name}}"

    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:9093/-/healthy | grep -q \\"OK\\""]

      retries: 3

    cap_drop:

version: "3.9"

# ------------------------------------------------------------------

networks:

    ipam:

    # Solo nginx expone puertos al host
  app-network:
    driver: bridge
    internal: true
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.21.0.0/24
  data-network:
    driver: bridge
    internal: true
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.22.0.0/24
  monitor-network:
    driver: bridge
    internal: true
    ipam:
      driver: default
      config:
        - subnet: 172.23.0.0/24

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# VOLUMES: Persistencia inmutable
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
volumes:
  postfix_mail:
    driver: local
  postfix_queue:
    driver: local
  dovecot_mail:
    driver: local
  dovecot_db:
    driver: local
  amavis_db:
    driver: local
  clamav_db:
    driver: local
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local
  minio_data:
    driver: local
  logs_shared:
    driver: local

    driver: local
  prometheus_data:

    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./nginx/certs:/etc/nginx/certs:ro
      - logs_shared:/var/log/nginx
    tmpfs:
      - /var/cache/nginx:size=128M
      - /var/run:size=64M
      - /tmp:size=64M
    read_only: true
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "nginx -t && wget -qO- http://localhost:443/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - NET_BIND_SERVICE  # Solo para puertos < 1024
    environment:
      - NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES=auto

    logging:
      driver: json-file

      # JWT
      - JWT_SECRET_FILE=/run/secrets/jwt_secret
      - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET_FILE=/run/secrets/jwt_refresh_secret
    secrets:
      - postgres_password
      - redis_password
      - jwt_secret
      - jwt_refresh_secret
      - session_encryption_key
      - ip_hash_salt
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=64M
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/health | grep -q \"ok\""]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 30s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1G
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "{{.Name}}"
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      dovecot:
        condition: service_healthy

  # =================================================================
  # APP-TIER — Next.js Frontend
  # =================================================================
  nextjs-frontend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: src/web/Dockerfile
      target: runner
    container_name: crux-nextjs
    networks:
      app-network:
        ipv4_address: 172.21.0.21
      public-network:
    expose:
      - "3001"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-production}
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://crux-fastify:3000
      - TZ=UTC

    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=32M
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:3001/ || exit 1"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 30s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "{{.Name}}"
    depends_on:
      fastify-backend:
        condition: service_healthy

  # =================================================================
  # MONITORING — OpenTelemetry Collector (OTLP traces + metrics)
  # =================================================================
  otel-collector:
    image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.113.0
    container_name: crux-otel
    networks:
      monitor-network:
        ipv4_address: 172.23.0.40
      app-network:
    expose:
      - "4317"
      - "4318"
    command:
      - '--config=/etc/otel-collector-config.yaml'
    volumes:
      - ./monitoring/otel-collector/otel-collector-config.yaml:/etc/otel-collector-config.yaml:ro
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=32M
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:13133/ | grep -q \"Service is ready\" || exit 1"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "{{.Name}}"
